sentences.arabic: تَشْغَلُ الأُسْرَةُ المُمْتَدَّةُ مَكَانَةً مَرْكَزِيَّةً فِي النَّسِيجِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ العَرَبِيِّ، حَيْثُ تُمَثِّلُ الحِصْنَ المَنِيعَ لِلأَفْرَادِ.
sentences.translation: Proširena porodica zauzima centralno mjesto u arapskom društvenom tkivu, predstavljajući neosvojivu tvrđavu za pojedince.
sentences.translationEn: The extended family occupies a central place in the Arab social fabric, representing an impregnable fortress for individuals.

sentences.arabic: الرَّوَابِطُ العَائِلِيَّةُ لَا تَقْتَصِرُ عَلَى الوَالِدَيْنِ وَالأَبْنَاءِ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَتَّسِعُ لِتَشْمَلَ الأَقَارِبَ جَمِيعًا.
sentences.translation: Porodične veze nisu ograničene samo na roditelje i djecu, već se šire na sve rođake.
sentences.translationEn: Family bonds are not limited only to parents and children, but expand to include all relatives.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النِّظَامُ التَّعَاوُنِيُّ يَقُومُ عَلَى مَبَادِئِ التَّكَافُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ وَالمَوَدَّةِ المُّتَبَادَلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj kooperativni sistem zasniva se na principima društvene solidarnosti i uzajamne naklonosti.
sentences.translationEn: This cooperative system is based on principles of social solidarity and mutual affection.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ أَمْعَنَّا النَّظَرَ فِي المُنَاسَبَاتِ، لَرَأَيْنَا كَيْفَ تَتَجَلَّى هَذِهِ الوَحْدَةُ فِي الِاجْتِمَاعَاتِ الدَّوْرِيَّةِ لِلأَهْلِ.
sentences.translation: Ako bismo pažljivije pogledali prilike, vidjeli bismo kako se ovo jedinstvo manifestuje u redovnim porodičnim okupljanjima.
sentences.translationEn: If we were to look closely at occasions, we would see how this unity manifests in regular family gatherings.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ اللِّقَاءَاتُ تُعَزِّزُ صِلَةَ الرَّحِمِ وَتُسَاهِمُ فِي حَلِّ المُشْكِلَاتِ بِطُرُقٍ وُدِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovi susreti jačaju rodbinske veze i doprinose rješavanju problema na prijateljski način.
sentences.translationEn: These meetings strengthen kinship ties and contribute to resolving problems in friendly ways.

sentences.arabic: بِالرَّغْمِ مِنْ التَّحَوُّلَاتِ الَّتِي فَرَضَتْهَا الحَيَاةُ الحَضَرِيَّةُ، إِلَّا أَنَّ قِيَمَ احْتِرَامِ الكِبَارِ لَا تَزَالُ سَائِدَةً.
sentences.translation: Uprkos transformacijama koje je nametnuo gradski život, vrijednosti poštovanja starijih i dalje preovladavaju.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the transformations imposed by urban life, the values of respecting elders still prevail.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّحَدِّيَ الحَقِيقِيَّ اليَوْمَ يَكْمُنُ فِي المِوَازَنَةِ بَيْنَ الِاسْتِقْلَالِيَّةِ وَالِالْتِزَامِ العَائِلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Pravi izazov danas leži u balansiranju između nezavisnosti i porodičnih obaveza.
sentences.translationEn: The real challenge today lies in balancing independence and family commitment.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ تُصَانَ هَذِهِ القِيَمُ لِأَنَّهَا تُشَكِّلُ دِرْعًا وَاقِيًا لِلشَّبَابِ مِنَ الضَّيَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Ove vrijednosti moraju se čuvati jer čine zaštitni štit za mlade od gubljenja identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: These values must be preserved because they form a protective shield for the youth against losing their way.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الخِتَامِ، تَبْقَى العَائِلَةُ فِي المَنْظُورِ العَرَبِيِّ هِيَ المَدْرَسَةُ الأُولَى لِلأَخْلَاقِ وَالشَّهَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, porodica u arapskoj perspektivi ostaje prva škola morala i plemenitosti.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, the family in the Arab perspective remains the first school of morals and gallantry.

sentences.arabic: فَمِنْ خِلَالِهَا يَتَشَرَّبُ المَرْءُ مَبَادِئَ التَّضَامُنِ الَّتِي تُمَيِّزُ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ الأَصِيلَةَ.
sentences.translation: Kroz nju čovjek upija principe solidarnosti koji karakterišu autentičnu arapsku ličnost.
sentences.translationEn: Through it, one absorbs the principles of solidarity that characterize the authentic Arab personality.
